summary: Frontend-only testing for Next.js 15 + TypeScript migration (SMPN 1 Sumber Jaya). All 6 routes return 200. SEO meta tags, OG/Twitter cards are SERVER-rendered correctly (verified via curl). Sitemap.xml returns 13 URLs, robots.txt contains User-Agent/Allow/Sitemap. All critical user flows work: navbar nav, home-page preview → listing links, berita detail (SSR body text confirmed), pengumuman listing with urgency badges, prestasi tally (47 penghargaan), PPDB Sonner toast, mobile menu toggle at 390px. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: package.json still carries CRA legacy deps (react-scripts 5.0.1, cra-template, @craco/craco, react-router-dom 7.5.1) — not used anymore under Next.js. Recommend pruning to shrink bundle and avoid developer confusion. Low priority.
next.config.js has `typescript.ignoreBuildErrors: false` which is good. `eslint.ignoreDuringBuilds: true` is acceptable for dev but consider enabling in CI.

robots.txt is served by /app/frontend/app/robots.ts AND there is also Cloudflare-managed content prefix in the response (expected in preview env). Core directives (User-Agent: *, Allow: /, Sitemap: ...) are present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Next.js 15 App Router migration is fully working. SSR/SSG pages render correctly with proper per-page metadata. Verified via curl: Home title 'SMPN 1 Sumber Jaya — Sekolah Ramah Anak di Lampung Barat — sejak 1985'; berita detail has unique title + og:image (Pexels) + article:published_time + article:author. Sitemap has exactly 13 URLs (1 home + 3 listings + 5 berita + 4 pengumuman). Pengumuman badges (Penting, Umum, Segera) are present in SSR HTML (Playwright inner_text had a timing issue but curl confirms presence). Stats count-up animation on home triggers on scroll (intersection observer). PPDB toast fires 'Formulir PPDB sedang diunduh'. Mobile menu (390px) opens with navigation items + 'Daftar PPDB' CTA. No console errors. All tests passed.
